questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第一章 名词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第一章 名词
questions.prompt:
提示：（入门基础班的练习题均作为知识点巩固练习，不和考试题型相关联）
题目：No one should enter the spot without the＿of the police.
questions.explanation: 名词，定冠词the+名词permission,故选B没有警察的许可，任何人都不得进入现场。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第一章 名词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第一章 名词
questions.prompt: To everyone' s＿,the girl finished the job quite well.
questions.explanation: 名词,名词所有格+名词satisfaction，故选D

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第一章 名词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第一章 名词
questions.prompt: You'd better put your＿in the bank.
questions.explanation: 名词所有格your+名词复数 多种贵重物品valuables故选A

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第一章 名词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第一章 名词
questions.prompt: There are 10__ assistants in that __shop.
questions.explanation: 妇女的名词复数women.鞋店用单数shoe shop

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第一章 名词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第一章 名词
questions.prompt: I found her sitting in the corner, reading __ newspaper, with __in her eyes.
questions.explanation: 报纸可数，一张报纸用单数a. 眼泪是几滴眼泪，不确定数目，用名词复数tears.

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第一章 名词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第一章 名词
questions.prompt: I need__ cloth,for I'm going to make __ clothes.
questions.explanation: cloth表示布料，不可数名词。clothes表示衣服，可数名词。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第一章 名词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第一章 名词
questions.prompt: He claimed that he would be a______in the presidential election, and would win the election at last.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查名词词义辨析。
【应试指导】句意：他声称要作为候选人参加总统竞选，而且最终将赢得胜利。voter选民；candidate候选人；partner伙伴；comrade同志。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第一章 名词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第一章 名词
questions.prompt: I'd rather marry a man who had a(n) ______of humor than one who was very attractive.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查名词词义辨析。
【应试指导】句意：我宁可嫁给一个具有幽默感的人，而不嫁给一个非常有魅力的人。capability 能力；sight视力，眼界；knowledge知识；sense感觉，sense of humor幽默感。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第二章 冠词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第二章 冠词
questions.prompt: The education of__ young has become__hot and serious topic in the present society.
questions.explanation: 定冠词the+形容词，表示这类人。不定冠词a+可数名词单数，表泛指。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第二章 冠词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第二章 冠词
questions.prompt: How beautiful you are today! I like __design of your shoes. They are __match for your dress.
questions.explanation: 定冠词the+of+名词，表示所有格。不定冠词a+可数名词单数表泛指。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第二章 冠词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第二章 冠词
questions.prompt: Have you heard__ news? The price of__ petrol is going up again!
questions.explanation: 定冠词the表特指。petrol石油是不可数名词，零冠词（什么都不写）表不可数名词的泛指。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第二章 冠词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第二章 冠词
questions.prompt: We went right round to the west coast by __sea instead of driving across__continent.
questions.explanation: 零冠词（什么都不写）表不可数名词的泛指，定冠词the+大陆continent表独一无二的。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第二章 冠词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第二章 冠词
questions.prompt: __apple fell from the tree and hit him on__head.
questions.explanation: 不定冠词an+可数名词apple表泛指。砸在某人头部hit someone one the head.

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第二章 冠词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第二章 冠词
questions.prompt: The rich _____not always happy.
questions.explanation: 定冠词the+形容词rich表示这类人，用复数形式。有钱人不常开心，用于一般现在时。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第二章 冠词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第二章 冠词
questions.prompt: I wonder if there is____ university in your hometown.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查冠词的用法。
【应试指导】句意：我想知道你的家乡有大学吗？此处university为可数名词，且为第一次提到，所以应用不定冠词，又因为university的发音以辅音开头，应选用a，故选C。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第三章 代词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第三章 代词
questions.prompt: Of all the books on the desk, ___is of any use for our study.
questions.explanation: 不定代词，表示三者以上，全部否定，用none.

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第三章 代词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第三章 代词
questions.prompt: We asked both John and Jerry, but ( ) could offer a satisfactory explanation.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查不定代词的用法。
【应试指导】句意：我请教了约翰和杰瑞，但是他们都没能给出一个满意的解释。neither两者都不；either(两者中的)任何一个；both两者都；nor 也不，也不是。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第三章 代词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第三章 代词
questions.prompt: The two teachers taught him 30 years ago, but ____ of them can recognize him now.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查不定代词。
【应试指导】句意:三十年前两位老师都教过他,但是现在老师们都认不出他了。根据but可知前后两句意思相反,即“现在老师们认不出他了”,故排除A、两项。none指“三者或三者以上任意一个都不……”, neither指“两者之间任意一个都不…”,故选D

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第三章 代词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第三章 代词
questions.prompt: Whenever was free, I would chat with John, Helen and a few ____friends
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查不定代词。
【应试指导】句意:每当我有空的时候,我就会和 Johnson、 Helen有其他几个朋友聊天空格后为名词的复数形式,分析句子可知,空格处需填一个形容词。“the other+名词复数”特指某一范围内的“其他的(人或物)”,相当于the others，指剩余的全部；another泛指同类事物中三者或三者以上中的“另一个”；other作形容词时指“其他的”，作代词时指“另外一个”；others相当于“other+名词复数”，指剩余的另一些，并非全部。故选C。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第三章 代词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第三章 代词
questions.prompt: My father asked _____ to help with his work.
questions.explanation: 英语句子里人称代词并列用法的排列顺序 ：首先说“你”，因为你在我面前，是为了表示对你的尊敬；然后说“他”，也是对他的尊敬；最后再提自己。这句主语时my father ,Tom和我是宾语，要用宾格，因此选B。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第三章 代词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第三章 代词
questions.prompt: A few days ago I visited a friend of _____ and that day I learned a valuable lesson.
questions.explanation: 名词性物主代词，等于My friend，“我的朋友”，选B。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第三章 代词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第三章 代词
questions.prompt: _____ can be good at something for 40years if he doesn’t love it .
questions.explanation:
根据句子“如果不喜欢一个行业的话，要40年如一日地好它，谁也没那本事。”
Anybody任何人 、Everybody每个人、Nobody没有人、Somebody某人

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第三章 代词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第三章 代词
questions.prompt: I would appreciate ________ if you could pay it in cash .
questions.explanation: 句意：如果能支付现金，那就再好不过了。appreciate it if... 。如果….将十分感激；

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第三章 代词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第三章 代词
questions.prompt: Don't you think you can compare it with life ____ ?
questions.explanation: 此题考查反身代词的用法，将it和life进行对比。所以其后的反身代词指的是Life，因此用itself来指代，所以选B。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第三章 代词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第三章 代词
questions.prompt: ____ schoolbag is newer than _____.
questions.explanation: 此题考查物主代词的用法。第一空后有一个名词，所以前面填一个形容词性的物主代词。第二空后没有名词，所以在前面填一个名词性的物主代词，相当于名词，所以选A。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第三章 代词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第三章 代词
questions.prompt:
---Oh, I came in a hurry and forgot to bring food.
----Never mind. You can have _______.
questions.explanation: 此题考查反身代词的用法，选项中应用一个词来代替 our food。所以选择一个名词性的物主代词，所以选B。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第三章 代词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第三章 代词
questions.prompt: Tom, please pass ______ the glasses, I want to read the newspapers.
questions.explanation: 此题考查人称代词的用法。pass后面应该加一个人称代词的宾格，其后提到我想看报纸，所以选择第一人称的宾格，所以选B。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第四章 数词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第四章 数词
questions.prompt: ___of the people on the net ___China's economy is among the strongest in the world
questions.explanation: 五分之四的人们是复数，分子用基数词，分子大于等于2，分母用序数词复数。动词用原形believe

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第四章 数词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第四章 数词
questions.prompt: China is___ larger than the United States.
questions.explanation: 六分之一，分子用基数词，分母用序数词。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第四章 数词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第四章 数词
questions.prompt: They are studying the Solar System's____ planet, Saturn, and its moons.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查限定词顺序。
【应试指导】句意：他们正在研究太阳系的第二大行星土星及其卫星。由题意可知，这里说的是第二大行星，故须用序数词second，而当序数词与最高级连用时，序数词应放在最高级的前面。故选A。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第四章 数词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第四章 数词
questions.prompt: My daughter and I took a _______ tour around New York City.
questions.explanation: 此题考查数词的用法。“基数词+连字符+名词”可以构成复合形容词表示数量，此时用单数形式。当前面有不定冠词a/an修饰时，后面通常加可数名词单数，所以选D。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第四章 数词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第四章 数词
questions.prompt: Nearly ________ of the 9000 species of birds feed on insects.
questions.explanation: 此题考查分数的用法。分数词由基数词和序数词构成，分子用基数词，分母用序数词，分子大于1时，分母要用复数的形式，所以选B。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第四章 数词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第四章 数词
questions.prompt: Four is _____ of a dozen.
questions.explanation: 此题考查数词的用法。分子用基数词，分母用序数词，分子大于1时，分母要用复数的形式。Dozen是12个，4刚好是三分之一，所以选D。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第四章 数词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第四章 数词
questions.prompt: Halloween is celebrated on _______.
questions.explanation: 万圣节是10月31号，注意序数词的表示方法，所以选B。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第五章 形容词与副词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第五章 形容词与副词
questions.prompt: What a nice fire you have in your fireplace!During the winter I like my house＿.
questions.explanation: 形容词warm,comfortable修饰房子，故选B

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第五章 形容词与副词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第五章 形容词与副词
questions.prompt: The child looked at me＿.
questions.explanation: 副词修饰动词look,故选B

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第五章 形容词与副词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第五章 形容词与副词
questions.prompt: Dan caught two___birds in the wood last week and they are still___in the cage.
questions.explanation: 形容词live作定语，表示活着，修饰名词bird；表语活着alive，故选C

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第五章 形容词与副词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第五章 形容词与副词
questions.prompt: You cannot be ______ careful when you drive a car.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查常用表达方法。
【应试指导】句意：驾驶汽车时，怎么小心都不过分。“cannot be too+形容词”构成特殊用法，意为“无论多么……都不为过”其他几项不合句意。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第五章 形容词与副词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第五章 形容词与副词
questions.prompt: Mr. Verder never thought that he would become a member of the board of directors because of his______ origin.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查形容词词义辨析。
【应试指导】句意：由于出身卑微，傅德先生从未想过他会成为董事会的一员。 humble卑微的；previous先前的，以前的；critical批评的；false错误的。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第五章 形容词与副词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第五章 形容词与副词
questions.prompt: He was found______ one month after he was born
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查形容词词义辨析。
【应试指导】句意：他出生一个月后被发现是个哑巴。quiet 安静的；still 静止不动的；silent 不说话的；dumb 哑的，不会说话的。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第五章 形容词与副词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第五章 形容词与副词
questions.prompt: They took_______measures to prevent poisonous gases from escaping.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查形容词词义辨析。
【应试指导】句意:他们采取了有效措施防止毒气泄漏。fruitful 硕果累累的，成功的；beneficial对......有益的，有利的；valuable 有价值的；effective 有放的，产生效果的。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第五章 形容词与副词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第五章 形容词与副词
questions.prompt: Doctors are worried ________ the possible spread of the disease.
questions.explanation: 担心某人的固定搭配为worry about sb/sth，所以选A。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第五章 形容词与副词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第五章 形容词与副词
questions.prompt: You' d better go there by train. The train ticket is ___ the plane ticket.
questions.explanation: 火车票比机票便宜三倍，用比较级，be n times cheaper than

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第五章 形容词与副词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第五章 形容词与副词
questions.prompt: Tea is considered by some Europeans ___popular drink, while coffee comes second.
questions.explanation: 多音节形容词最高级，用the most

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第五章 形容词与副词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第五章 形容词与副词
questions.prompt: Kate is complaining again. She has a good job and plenty of money. What ___ does she want?
questions.explanation: 两者事物中，用比较级more.

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第五章 形容词与副词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第五章 形容词与副词
questions.prompt: How did you find your visit to Disneyland? I enjoyed it very much. It was___ than I had expected.
questions.explanation: 比我预期的有趣得多，用比较级be far more interesting than

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第五章 形容词与副词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第五章 形容词与副词
questions.prompt: The bicycles in the other shops will be___ but___
questions.explanation: 别的地方自行车会更便宜 比较级，但是没那么好not as good (as)。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第五章 形容词与副词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第五章 形容词与副词
questions.prompt: The facilities of the older hotel______ .

options.text: is as good or better than the new hotel
are as good or better than the new hotel .
is as good as or better than that of the new hotel
are as good as or better than those of the new hotel

questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查主谓一致和比较级的用法。
【应试指导】句意：那家旧些的旅馆的设施和新旅馆的设施一样好，或旧旅馆的设施比新旅馆的设施更好。主语facilities为复数，首先排除A、C两项。B项的比较对象不妥当，D项为比较级正确形式。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第五章 形容词与副词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第五章 形容词与副词
questions.prompt: She is treated _ better than I was.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查比较级的修饰词。
【应试指导】句意：她比我的待遇好很多。四个选项只有much能用来修饰比较级，故选B。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第五章 形容词与副词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第五章 形容词与副词
questions.prompt: The facilities of the older hotel_______.

options.text: is as good or better than the new hotel
are as good or better than the new hotel
is as good as or better than that of the new hotel
are as good as or better than those of the new hotel

questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查主谓一致和比较级的用法。
【应试指导】句意：那家旧些的旅馆的设施和新旅馆的设施一样好,或旧旅馆的设施比新旅馆的设施更好。主语 facilities 为复数，首先排除 A、C 两项。B 项的比较对象不妥当，D 项为比较级正确形式。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第六章 介词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第六章 介词
questions.prompt: We' re looking ＿to hearing from you soon.
questions.explanation: 期待，用短语look forward to doing sth.

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第六章 介词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第六章 介词
questions.prompt: WTO stands __the World Trade Organization.
questions.explanation: 短语stand for代表或象征的意思。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第六章 介词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第六章 介词
questions.prompt: Finally he managed to get into contact __them.
questions.explanation: get contact with sb. 与某人联系。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第六章 介词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第六章 介词
questions.prompt: All the students in this class passed the English exam ______ the exception of Li Ming.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查固定搭配。
【应试指导】句意：除了李明，该班学生通过了英语考试。with the exception of...为固定搭配，意为“除……以外”。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第六章 介词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第六章 介词
questions.prompt: The committee is totally opposed______any changes being made in the plans.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查固定搭配。
【应试指导】句意：委员会完全反对对计划作任何变动。be opposed to构成固定搭配，意为“反对”。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第六章 介词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第六章 介词
questions.prompt: We love peace, yet we are not the kind of people to yield ___ any military threat.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查固定搭配。
【应试指导】句意：我们热爱和平，但我们不是那种屈服于武力威胁的人。yield to为固定词组，意为“屈服于……，对……妥协”。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第六章 介词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第六章 介词
questions.prompt: He did it______gratitude for everything she had done for him.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查介词词义辨析。
【应试指导】句意：他那样做是出于感激她为他所做的一切。 out of gratitude出于感激；with regard to 关于。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第七章 动词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第七章 动词
questions.prompt: Let's go into the garden and＿some roses for your mother.
questions.explanation: pick摘取。让我们去花园摘一些玫瑰给你妈吧。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第七章 动词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第七章 动词
questions.prompt: He was disappointed to find his suggestions __.
questions.explanation: 短语turn down拒绝否决的意思。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第七章 动词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第七章 动词
questions.prompt: When the little girl got back her answer sheet, she could not help _.
questions.explanation: 短语can (could) not help doing忍不住做某事。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第七章 动词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第七章 动词
questions.prompt: My sister is used to __with all the windows open.
questions.explanation: be used to doing sth. 习惯于做某事。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第七章 动词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第七章 动词
questions.prompt: Our game of basketball ___.We had been playing for about half an hour when it started to rain heavily.
questions.explanation: 后文时过去时，前文也要保持时态一致。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第七章 动词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第七章 动词
questions.prompt: The hotel wasn't particularly good, but I _____ in many worse hotels.
questions.explanation: 根据时态，前文用的是过去时，曾经住过更糟的酒店，动作发生在更早之前，故用过去完成时had stayed.

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第七章 动词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第七章 动词
questions.prompt: I wonder whether the soldier is one of those who ___ abroad to keep peace.
questions.explanation: one of those是复数形式，用have been，和前文的wonder时态保持一致。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第七章 动词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第七章 动词
questions.prompt: Did you go to the show last night? Yeah. Every boy and girl in the area _____invited.
questions.explanation: 不定代词every,用单数形式，和前文did时态一致，用过去时。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第七章 动词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第七章 动词
questions.prompt: It is important that enough money______to fund the project.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查虚拟语气。
【应试指导】句意：重要的是募集足够的钱，为这个项目提供资金。在“It is important that...”结构中，that引导的从句中应使用虚拟语气，即，“should+动词原形”，其中should可省略故选A。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第七章 动词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第七章 动词
questions.prompt: If the whole operation______ beforehand, a great deal of time and money would have been lost.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查虚拟语气。
【应试指导】句意：如果事先没有计划好整个运作，大量的时间和金钱将会流失。由would have been lost可知此处表示与过去事实相反的虚拟语气，从句中应使用“had+过去分词”。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第七章 动词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第七章 动词
questions.prompt: We wouldn't lose heart even if we______ again.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查虚拟语气。
【应试指导】句意：即使我们再次失败，也不会丧失信心。主句用“would+动词原形”，从句用一般过去式。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第七章 动词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第七章 动词
questions.prompt: I got caught in the rain and my suit______ .
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查动词的时态和语态。
【应试指导】句意：我淋雨了，我的西服被毁坏了。此题是一个由and连接的并列句，and前的句子用一般过去时，and后的句子强调过去发生的事情对现在造成的影响，用现在完成时；又因为my suit与ruin之间为被动关系，故用现在完成时的被动语态。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第七章 动词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第七章 动词
questions.prompt: _______ at such a time, his work attracted much attention.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查非谓语动词。
【应试指导】句意：他的作品在这样一个时刻出版，受到了很大关注。his work与publish之间为被动关系，故用过去分词形式。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第七章 动词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第七章 动词
questions.prompt: Silver is the best conductor of electricity, copper_______ it closely.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查非谓语动词。
【应试指导】句意：银是最好的导电体，铜紧次之。 copper与follow之间为主动关系，故用现在分词形式。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第七章 动词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第七章 动词
questions.prompt: I remembered that the air conditioners ( ) turned off before I left home.
questions.explanation: 考查动词的时态。句意：我记得在离开家之前空调已经关上了。Turn off的动作发生在left home之前，因此要用过去完成时态。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第七章 动词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第七章 动词
questions.prompt: If it had not rained yesterday, they ——work on time.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查虚拟语气。
【应试指导】句意：如果昨天没有下雨，他们就能按时完成工作。“If”引导的条件状语从句中用了“had not rained”，是对过去发生的事情的虚拟，所以主句的谓语动词应用“would have+动词过去分词”。故选C。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第七章 动词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第七章 动词
questions.prompt: He entered the office hurriedly, __ the door open.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查非谓语动词。
【应试指导】句意：他匆忙闯进办公室，门都没来得及关。主语“He”与让门开着是主动关系，故用动词的现在分词来表示伴随状态。故选B。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第七章 动词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第七章 动词
questions.prompt: _____ his telephone number, she didn't know how to get in touch with him.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查非谓语动词。
【应试指导】句意：已经忘记了他的电话号码，她不知道怎么去联系他。forget与其逻辑主语she之间为主动关系，且forget这一动作发生在主句动作发生之前，应用完成时态，A项符合题意，故选A。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第七章 动词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第七章 动词
questions.prompt: If you___stayed at home, this would never have happened.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查虚拟语气。
【应试指导】句意：要是你待在家里的话，这件事就不会发生了。此处为if引导的虚拟条件句，主句的谓语为“would+have+过去分词”形式，所以这里表示与过去事实相反的虚拟语气，if条件句中的谓语形式应为过去完成式形式，故选B。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第七章 动词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第七章 动词
questions.prompt: One of the strongest hurricanes _____ was the Florida Keys Storm of 1935, during which 500 people were killed.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查非谓语动词。
【应试指导】句意：有记载的最强的飓风之一是1935年的佛罗里达群岛风暴，此风暴造成500人死亡。the strongest humcanes与record之间为被动关系，所以要用record的过去分词形式，作the strongest hurncanes的后置定语。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第七章 动词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第七章 动词
questions.prompt: When John left the office, Amy __ at her desk.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查动词的时态。
【应试指导】句意：约翰离开办公室时，艾米仍然在工作。由时间状语when John left the office可知，谓语动词时态应为过去进行时，表示过去某一时刻或某一时间段正在进行的动作，故选D。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第七章 动词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第七章 动词
questions.prompt: I sent him the package yesterday. He_____it by now.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查动词的时态。
【应试指导】句意：我昨天把包裹发给他了，到现在他可能已经收到了。由时间状语by now及句意可知，此处应用现在完成时，且此处有猜测的含义，might可能，表示推测，故选A。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第七章 动词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第七章 动词
questions.prompt: If Peter had told his teacher about his difficulty in math homework,she ____ him before the exam.
questions.explanation: 考查虚拟语气。句意:如果皮特过去告诉他的老师他在数学作业方面的困难,她一定会在考试前帮助他。这是对过去的虚拟,从句用“if+主语+had done”式,主句用“主语+would have done”的形式,故选C。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第七章 动词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第七章 动词
questions.prompt: _______ at such a time, his work attracted much attention
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查非谓语动词。
【应试指导】句意：他的作品在这样一个时刻出版，受到了很大关注。his work 与 publish 之间为被动关系，故用过去分词形式。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第七章 动词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第七章 动词
questions.prompt: Silver is the best conductor of electricity，copper______ it closely
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查非谓语动词。
【应试指导】句意:银是最好的导电体,铜紧次之。copper 与 follow 之间为主动关系，故用现在分词形式。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第七章 动词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第七章 动词
questions.prompt: If only the committee_______the regulations( 规章）and put them into effect as soon as possible.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查虚拟语气。
【应试指导】句意:要是委员会尽快批准这些规章制度并付诸实施就好了。由 if only 引导的句子须用虚拟语气形式，此处表示现在情况的虚拟语气,应用“would +动词原形”的形式。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第七章 动词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第七章 动词
questions.prompt: We wouldn’t lose heart even if we_______again.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查虚拟语气。
【应试指导】句意：即使我们再次失败,也不会丧失信心。主句用“would +动词原形”，从句用一般过去式。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第八章 连词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第八章 连词
questions.prompt: I'd like to go with you; , my hands are full at the moment.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查连词辨析。
【应试指导】句意：我想和你一起去，但是现在我手头正忙着。 whenever无论何时；however但是； wherever无论何地；whatever无论何物。只有however能用来表示转折关系，故选B。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第八章 连词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第八章 连词
questions.prompt: My secretary usually opens my post____it's marked "private".
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查连词词义辨析。
【应试指导】句意：我的秘书通常会打开我的邮件，除非邮件标有“私人信件”字样。For为了，表示目的；as因为，表示原因；unless除非，表示否定条件；if如果，表示假设。C项符合题意，故选C。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第八章 连词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第八章 连词
questions.prompt: ____ it is not his responsibility to do that, he said he would help.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查连词词义辨析。
【应试指导】句意：尽管做那件事并不是他的职责所在，他仍说他会帮忙。although尽管，虽然，即使，表示让步；as因为，表示原因；since因为，由于，表示原因；unless除非，表示转折。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第八章 连词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第八章 连词
questions.prompt: You'd better speak loudly at the meeting ____ everyone can hear you.
questions.explanation: 考查连词句意:在会议上你最好讲大声点,以便每个都可以听到你的声音。 except that意为“除了…以外”,such that意为“使得,结果是”,in that意为“因为”, so that意为“以便于,为了”,故选D。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第八章 连词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第八章 连词
questions.prompt: The job applicant was worried about the interview ____ he was well prepared.
questions.explanation: 考查连词。句意:尽管求职者准备得很充分,但他还是对面试感到担心。if意为“如果”,because意为“因为”,when意为“当…时候”,though意为“管”结合句意,故选D。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第八章 连词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第八章 连词
questions.prompt: The news ____the general manager had been arrested shocked everyone.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查连词
【应试指导】句意:总经理被抓的消息震惊了所有人。分析句子可知,空格处需要填一个连接词引导同位语从句,且只起连接作用,不充当从句中的任何成分,故选C。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第八章 连词
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第八章 连词
questions.prompt:
Teachers are some of the most important professionals in the world: They are responsible __21__preparing future generations to become productive and honest citizens, who will __22__ to society for the whole of their adult life
Obviously, the most common reason __23__ teachers decide to teach is the ability to make a difference.There are many professions that give people the ability to have a(n) __24__ impact on the world and change people’s lives, __25__ few professions have a direct impact on __26__ a better society as teachers do. People tend to __27__ their teachers for years after they finish school, for good teachers can __28__ their students to become something that they __29__ thought they could be, or to work __30__ a field that they thought they did not __31__
Teachers are also important because they provide __32__ for their students. In certain low-income areas __33__ some students may not have both of their parents __34__, teachers can provide an important influence that helps their students make the right __35__, even when they are not in the classroom.Generally, teachers' impact on students can last all through their life.
请选择正确选项填入（25）
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】连词辨析题
【应试指导】本句句意：但是很少有职业像教师一样对创造一个更好的社会有直接的影响。根据空格前的many professions和空格后的 few professions以及句意可知,空格前后句子之间为转折关系,but意为“但是”,表转折,故选B

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第九章 陈述句、疑问句、祈使句、感叹句
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第九章 陈述句、疑问句、祈使句、感叹句
questions.prompt: The women carrying babies, come in first, ___?
questions.explanation: 祈使句的反意疑问句：抱小孩的妇女先走，好吗，包括听话者在内，用will you表示反意疑问句的结尾。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第九章 陈述句、疑问句、祈使句、感叹句
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第九章 陈述句、疑问句、祈使句、感叹句
questions.prompt: Tom, you go and pick up Mary from the station,___? But she's already got home.
questions.explanation: 祈使句，包括听话者在内，用will you表示反意疑问句的结尾。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第九章 陈述句、疑问句、祈使句、感叹句
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第九章 陈述句、疑问句、祈使句、感叹句
questions.prompt: ___ ways to be more gentle with the Earth, or we'll be punished.
questions.explanation: 祈使句，以动词原形开头。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第九章 陈述句、疑问句、祈使句、感叹句
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第九章 陈述句、疑问句、祈使句、感叹句
questions.prompt: What ___ fine weather it is today!
questions.explanation: 感叹句，what开头+名词。天气是不可数名词，故不用a (an).

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第九章 陈述句、疑问句、祈使句、感叹句
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第九章 陈述句、疑问句、祈使句、感叹句
questions.prompt: _____ a wonderful trip he had when he traveled in China!
questions.explanation: 此题考查感叹句的用法，what修饰名词，而How后面通常修饰的是形容词，所以选C。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第九章 陈述句、疑问句、祈使句、感叹句
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第九章 陈述句、疑问句、祈使句、感叹句
questions.prompt: ____ interesting the film is!
questions.explanation: 此题考查感叹句的用法，what修饰名词，而how后面通常修饰的是形容词，所以选C。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.prompt: _______ ，he is not a very bright pupil

options.text: As far as his intelligence is concerned
As far his intelligence is concerned
As far as his intelligence are concerned

questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查固定搭配。
【应试指导】句意：就智力而言，他并非是一位非常聪明的学生。as far as…be concerned 为固定词组，意为 就......而言”。又因为 intelligence —词为不可数名词，故选 A。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.prompt: She was so_______in her job that she didn’t hear anybody knocking at the door.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查固定搭配。
【应试指导】句意：她工作如此专心以至于没有听到有人敲门。be absorbed in 为固定搭配，意为“专心致志做某事”。A、C、D 三项均与句子构不成搭配。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.prompt: I'm afraid I have to give it up. Don't be discouraged. Remember _____ sticks to his work will succeed one day.
questions.explanation: 主语从句，whoever引导主语。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.prompt: My parents don't care _____my pocket money goes, but one thing is for sure: the money spent must be worthwhile.
questions.explanation: where引导don't care加上的宾语从句。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.prompt: The view ___many scientists hold is___ too much emission of carbon dioxide is destructive.
questions.explanation: 第一个that引导的是主语the view的同位语从句。第二个that引导的是表语从句。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.prompt: The moment _____Leo will never forget is ____ Mr. Green gave him a lot of valuable advice on how to improve his writing.
questions.explanation: 分析句子结构可知,moment和is之间为定语从句,先行词是the moment,从句中forget后面缺少宾语,所以应用关系代词that引导。when引导定语从句时,在从句中作时间状语,所以不符合题意。is之后为表语从句,应用连接副词when引导,相当于the time when,在从句中作时间状语。故选A。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.prompt: _______ parents say and do has a life-long effect on their children.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查主语从句。
【应试指导】句意：父母的言行对他们的孩子有终生的影响。从句中缺少宾语，排除that，因that在名词性从句中不充当任何成分。 which有选择含义，应排除。 what符合题意。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.prompt: I know _____ did the good deed.
questions.explanation: 我知道谁做的好事。who引导宾语从句。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.prompt: How much did this set of furniture cost? I forgot_____.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查宾语从句的语序。
【应试指导】 句意：——这套家具花费了多少钱？——我忘记花费多少钱了。 forgot启为宾语从句，宾语从句必须用陈述句语序。由forgot可知，宾语从句的谓语动词应为过去式形式，故选C。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.prompt: _______parents say and do has a life-long effect on their children.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查主语从句。
【应试指导】句意：父母的言行对他们的孩子有终生的影响。从句中缺少宾语，排除 that,因 that在名词性从句中不充当任何成分。which 有选择含义，应排除。what 符合题意。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.prompt: I had an experience some years ago; ____ taught me something I'll never forget.
questions.explanation: 逗号隔开，which引导的是非限定性定语从句，并未具体指代某个单词，而是进行补充说明，整句话结构更松散。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.prompt: Many children, ____parents are away working in big cities, are taken good care of in the village.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查非限制性定语从句。
【应试指导】句意：很多小孩在村里都得到了很好的照顾，他们的父母远在大城市里打工。whose引导非限制性定语从句，且在从句中作定语，符合题意。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.prompt: I'd like to live somewhere______the sun shines all year long.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查定语从句。
【应试指导】句意：我想住在某个整年都是阳光明媚的地方。关系副词where引导定语从句，且地点状语，符合题意。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.prompt: I’d like to find someone ( )I can discuss such a problem.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查定语从句。
【应试指导】句意：我想找一个可以与之讨论这种问题的人。本句中不定代词someone之后的成分属于限制性定语从句，需用关系代词连接来修饰someone这个单词。关系代词在从句中作宾语，因此用第三人称单数形式whom。 to discuss sth．with sb．表示“与某人谈论某事”，定语从句中介词通常前置，置于关系代词之前。因此本题选C。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.prompt: I’d like to live somewhere______ the sun shines all year long.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查定语从句。
【应试指导】句意：我想住在某个整年都是阳光明媚的地方 C 关系副词 where 引导定语从句，且在从句中作地点状语,符合题意。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.prompt: Let’s think of a situation______ this idiom can be used.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查定语从句。
【应试指导】句意：咱们来想一个能够应用这个成语的语境。where 引导定语从句且在从句中作地点状语，符合题意。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.prompt: Many children, _____ parents are away working in big cities，are taken good care of in the village.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查非限制性定语从句。
【应试指导】句意:很多小孩在村里都得到了很好的照顾，他们的父母远在大城市里打工。whose 引导非限制性定语从句，且在从句中作定语，符合题意。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.prompt: Will you come to my office when you ___your work? Sure.
questions.explanation: 时间状语从句，主句将来时，从句一般现在时或现在完成时。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.prompt: He _____ football regularly for many years when he was young.
questions.explanation: 时间状语从句，年轻时踢足球很多年，用一般过去时。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.prompt: Mike, it's a pity you didn't come to last night's concert. It was really great! Really? If I ____so busy, l would have gone with you.
questions.explanation: 假如我当时没那么忙，我当初就会和你一起去。虚拟语气与过去的事实相反，if引导的条件状语从句用过去完成时。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.prompt: Progress so far has been very good. We are , ___, confident that the work will be completed on time.
questions.explanation: 目前进展很不错，因此我们有信心按时。therefore表示所以，引导结果状语从句。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.prompt: He is a nice listener; ____he feels the time is right he will give you his thoughts.
questions.explanation: when引导时间状语从句，用一般现在时，主句用将来时。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.prompt: How can you keep fit___ you smoke so much?
questions.explanation: 主句用将来时，或情态动词，从句用一般现在时，用于when引导的时间状语从句。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第十章 简单句、并列句、复合句
questions.prompt: He was driving so fast as to get himself into a dangerous situation ___ he is likely to lose the control over his car.
questions.explanation: where引导地点状语从句，表示深处的处境。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第十一章 强调和倒装
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第十一章 强调和倒装
questions.prompt: It is imagination ___ makes the world colorful, full of vigor and vitality.
questions.explanation: it is...that...是强调句，即：去掉这些关联词，剩下的部分仍然可以组成完整的句子。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第十一章 强调和倒装
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第十一章 强调和倒装
questions.prompt: It was not until midnight____they reached the campsite.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查强调句。
【应试指导】句意：他们直到半夜才到达宿营地。强调句的结构为：It is/was+被强调部分+that/who+其他成分。此句可还原为：They didn't reach the campsite until midnight.

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第十一章 强调和倒装
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第十一章 强调和倒装
questions.prompt: The organization had broken no rules, but ____had it acted responsibly.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查倒装句。
【应试指导】句意：该机构没有违规，但也没有很负责任地操作。后半句为倒装句，所以A项正确。 C、D两项可排除。B用so的前提示前面句子必定时肯定句，所以B项错。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第十一章 强调和倒装
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第十一章 强调和倒装
questions.prompt: Not only______ very well, but also______ well.

options.text: does she cook; does she dance

questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查not only...but also的用法。
【应试指导】句意：她不仅善于烹调，而且善于跳舞。not only放在句首时，句子要倒装，但but also后的句子不必倒装。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第十一章 强调和倒装
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第十一章 强调和倒装
questions.prompt: My room gets very cold at night.（）
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查倒装语序。
【应试指导】句意：——我的房间到晚上就变得很冷。——我的也是。由so，neither，nor开头的句子，表示重复前面句子的部分意思，但前后两句的主语不同，且句子应用倒装结构。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第十一章 强调和倒装
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第十一章 强调和倒装
questions.prompt: Only by telling the truth（）win the trust and support of your friends.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查倒装句式。
【应试指导】句意：只有坦诚才能让你赢得朋友的信任与支持。“only+介词短语”置于句首时，后面的句子应倒装。结合句意可知，句子应使用一般现在时。故选D。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第十一章 强调和倒装
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第十一章 强调和倒装
questions.prompt: Only in my thirties _____ a purpose in life.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查倒装句和动词的时态。
【应试指导】句意：直到到了30多岁，我才找到了生活的目的。“only+介词短语”结构置于句首时，句子要用倒装结构。由in my thirties可知，句子应为一般过去时，只有A项符合题意，故选A。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第十一章 强调和倒装
questions.linkName: 第一部分 语法>第十一章 强调和倒装
questions.prompt: Not only______ very well, but also_______ well.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】 考查 not only...but also 的用法。
【应试指导】 句意:她不仅善于烹调，而且善于跳舞。not only 放在句首时，句子要倒装，但 but also后的句子不必倒装。

questions.linkName: 第三部分 词汇>第一、二章 构词法及常用短语
questions.prompt: ______, he is not a very right pupil.

options.text: As far as his intelligence is concerned
As far his intelligence is concerned
As far as his intelligence are concerned

questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】考查固定搭配。
【应试指导】句意：就智力而言，他并非是一位非常聪明的学生。 as far as...be concerned为固词组，意为“就……而言”。又因为intelligence一词为不可数名词，故选A。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第一章 完形填空
questions.linkName: 第四部分 综合知识>第一章 完形填空
questions.prompt:
We were late as usual. My husband had ___1___ watering the flowers in the garden by himself, and when he discovered that he couldn't manage, he asked me for___2___at the last moment. So now we had only one hour to get to the airport. Luckily, there were not many cars ___3___ buses on the road and we were ___4___ to get there just in time. We checked in and went straight to a big hall to wait for our flight to be called. We waited and waited ___5___ no announcement was made. We asked for ___6___and the girl there told us the plane hadn't even arrived yet. In the end, there came an announcement telling us that those ___7___ for flight No.108 could get a free meal voucher and that the plane hadn't left Spain ___8___ technical problems. We thought that meant ___9___ it until late it wasn't safe for the plane to ___10___. We waited again for a long time until late evening when we were asked to report again. This time we were ___11___ free vouchers to spend the night in a nearby hotel.
The next morning after a ___12___ night because of all the planes taking off and landing, we were reported back to the airport. Guess ___13___ had happened while we were asleep. Our plane had arrived and taken off again. All the other___14___had been waken up in the night to catch the plane, but for some reasons or other we had been ___15___. You can imagine how we felt!
请选择合适的选项填入（ 1）中.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】理解推断题。
【应试指导】A、B、C三项都可以跟移．-ing形式，但此处意为“我丈夫坚持自己浇花园里的花”，故可排除A、C两项，故选B。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第一章 完形填空
questions.linkName: 第四部分 综合知识>第一章 完形填空
questions.prompt:
We were late as usual. My husband had ___1___ watering the flowers in the garden by himself, and when he discovered that he couldn't manage, he asked me for___2___at the last moment. So now we had only one hour to get to the airport. Luckily, there were not many cars ___3___ buses on the road and we were ___4___ to get there just in time. We checked in and went straight to a big hall to wait for our flight to be called. We waited and waited ___5___ no announcement was made. We asked for ___6___and the girl there told us the plane hadn't even arrived yet. In the end, there came an announcement telling us that those ___7___ for flight No.108 could get a free meal voucher and that the plane hadn't left Spain ___8___ technical problems. We thought that meant ___9___ it until late it wasn't safe for the plane to ___10___. We waited again for a long time until late evening when we were asked to report again. This time we were ___11___ free vouchers to spend the night in a nearby hotel.
The next morning after a ___12___ night because of all the planes taking off and landing, we were reported back to the airport. Guess ___13___ had happened while we were asleep. Our plane had arrived and taken off again. All the other___14___had been waken up in the night to catch the plane, but for some reasons or other we had been ___15___. You can imagine how we felt!
请选择合适的选项填入（ 3）中.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】理解推断题。
【应试指导】此处表示“路上既没有很多小轿车也没有很多公共汽车”，or用于否定词后，表示 “也不”，符合题意。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第一章 完形填空
questions.linkName: 第四部分 综合知识>第一章 完形填空
questions.prompt:
Have you ever had to decide whether to go shopping or stay home and watch TV on a weekend? Now you___1___do both at the same time. Home shopping television networks(网络)have become a ___2___ for many people to shop without ___3___ having to leave their home.
Some shoppers are___4___of department stores and supermarkets—fighting the crowds, waiting in long lines, and sometimes having slight ___5___ of finding anything they want to buy. They'd rather sit quietly at home in front of the TV set and watch a friendly announcer describe a product ___6___a model shows it. And they can shop around the clock, buying something ___7___ by making a phone call.
Department stores and even mail-order companies are ___8___ to join in the success of home shopping. Large department stores are busy ___9___ their own TV channels(频道)to encourage TV shopping in the future. Customers can ask questions about products and place ___10___ , all through their TV sets.
Will shopping by television ___11___ take the place of shopping in stores? Some industry managers think so. ___12___ many people find shopping at a real store a great enjoyment. And for many shoppers, it is still important to ___13___or try on dresses they want to buy. That's ___14___ specialists say that in the future, home shopping will ___15___ together with store shopping but will never entirely replace it.
请选择合适的选项填入（ 1）中.
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】理解推断题
【应试指导】网络购物时代人们能够（can）进行购物和待在家里看电视两不误。

Some shoppers are___4___of department stores and supermarkets—fighting the crowds, waiting in long lines, and sometimes having slight ___5___ of finding anything they want to buy. They'd rather sit quietly at home in front of the TV set and watch a friendly announcer describe a product ___6___a model shows it. And they can shop around the clock, buying something ___7___ by making a phone call.
Department stores and even mail-order companies are ___8___ to join in the success of home shopping. Large department stores are busy ___9___ their own TV channels(频道)to encourage TV shopping in the future. Customers can ask questions about products and place ___10___ , all through their TV sets.
Will shopping by television ___11___ take the place of shopping in stores? Some industry managers think so. ___12___ many people find shopping at a real store a great enjoyment. And for many shoppers, it is still important to ___13___or try on dresses they want to buy. That's ___14___ specialists say that in the future, home shopping will ___15___ together with store shopping but will never entirely replace it.
请选择合适的选项填入（ 4）中.

【考情点拨】词义辨析题。
【应试指导】be proud of为……自豪；be fond of 喜欢……；be tired of厌烦……；be careful of小心……。从后文中所列举的商店购物的不利之处．可知，应选C。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第一章 完形填空
questions.linkName: 第四部分 综合知识>第一章 完形填空
questions.prompt:
Cloze ( 30 points)
Directions:For each blank in the following passage, there are four choices marked A, B0 Cand D. Choose the one that is most suitable and mark your answer by blackeningthe corresponding letter on the Answer Sheet.
What enables some people to get big creative breakthroughs while others only get small and non-creative breakdowns, blaming themselves and society? Are some people "gifted"? Are there other factors ___21___ work--factors that we have more control over than we think?
While nobody can deny the ___22___ that some people seem to be blessed with particular creativity, research shows that anyone can ___23___ their chances of coming up with new and original ideas ___24___ they would only engage themselves more in the process of ___25___ . It' s the old Thomas Edison thing about "discovery ___26___ 99 percent perspiration (汗水) and 1 percent inspiration. "
___27___ , the studies prove this:great creative breakthroughs usually happen only ___28___ intense periods of struggle. It is sustained effort towards a specific goal ___29___ eventually prepares for great creative insights.
This kind of sustained effort does not always ___30___ immediate results, a fact that not only separates the innovators (革新者) from non-innovators, but ___31___ leads some people to conclude that it is just not ___32___ for them. "Maybe I should have gone to medical school like my mother wanted," they wonder when the breakthrough is ___33___ to be found. Alas, one forgets during inevitable encounters ___34___ self-doubt,that the big surprise is never ___35___ . Indeed,it can happen at any time and place.
选择合适的选项填在21处
questions.explanation: 此处表示“是否还有其他因素在起作用”，at work意为“(因素)在起作用”，符合题意。

questions.chapterName: 第一章 完形填空
questions.linkName: 第四部分 综合知识>第一章 完形填空
questions.prompt:
Cloze ( 30 points)
Directions:For each blank in the following passage, there are four choices marked A, B0 Cand D. Choose the one that is most suitable and mark your answer by blackeningthe corresponding letter on the Answer Sheet.
What enables some people to get big creative breakthroughs while others only get small and non-creative breakdowns, blaming themselves and society? Are some people "gifted"? Are there other factors ___21___ work--factors that we have more control over than we think?
While nobody can deny the ___22___ that some people seem to be blessed with particular creativity, research shows that anyone can ___23___ their chances of coming up with new and original ideas ___24___ they would only engage themselves more in the process of ___25___ . It' s the old Thomas Edison thing about "discovery ___26___ 99 percent perspiration (汗水) and 1 percent inspiration. "
___27___ , the studies prove this:great creative breakthroughs usually happen only ___28___ intense periods of struggle. It is sustained effort towards a specific goal ___29___ eventually prepares for great creative insights.
This kind of sustained effort does not always ___30___ immediate results, a fact that not only separates the innovators (革新者) from non-innovators, but ___31___ leads some people to conclude that it is just not ___32___ for them. "Maybe I should have gone to medical school like my mother wanted," they wonder when the breakthrough is ___33___ to be found. Alas, one forgets during inevitable encounters ___34___ self-doubt,that the big surprise is never ___35___ . Indeed,it can happen at any time and place.
选择合适的选项填在25处
questions.explanation: 此处表示增加想出新点子的机会的条件，所以“如果在创造的过程中全身心投入，不断尝试的话”，就会增加想出新点子的机会。creation意为“创造”，符合题意。practice实践;production生产;achievement成就。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第一章 完形填空
questions.linkName: 第四部分 综合知识>第一章 完形填空
questions.prompt:
In our online life, we need to use passwords frequently. We use passwords___21___e-mail, gaming sites, social networking sites, and other shopping sites___22___ ， the passwords most people use are not very___23___and can easily be “broken” by others. In fact, the most commonly used passwords are so simple that it requires very___24___ effort to figure them out. Can you guess___25___ the most commonly used passwords are? They are: Names of baseball teams, birth dates of a family___26___the year of a special sports event, the random numbers like 156468, ___27___the name of a friend, pet, favorite TV star, or band.
There are prograns___28___to break into people's online accounts. These programs are___29___of trying every word in the English dictionary and the dictionaries___30___ many foreign languages, in their effort to break into an account. ___31___can even search words backward. Some will try___32___ words or words that are followed by numbers, ___33___school222. These programs can test millions of passwords in a few minutes. So, you are advised to be careful about___34___passwords so that they will be hard to break. You are also advi dvised not to make them___35___hard to remember. Meanwhile, you need to change them once in a while.
选择合适的选项填在21处
questions.explanation: 介词辨析题。空格处的句子所要表达的意思是“将密码用于邮箱、游戏网站等”,use...for意为“用于”,故选D。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第二章 阅读理解
questions.linkName: 第四部分 综合知识>第二章 阅读理解
questions.prompt:
Passage One
There is a popular belief among parents that schools are no longer interested in spelling. No school I have taught in has ever ignored spelling or considered it unimportant as a basic skill. There are, however, vastly different ideas about how to teach it, or how much priority it must be giver over general language development and writing ability. The problem is , how to encourage a child to express himself freely and confidently in writing without holding him back with the complexities of spelling.
If spelling becomes the only focal point of his teacher's interest, clearly a bright child will be likely to “play safe". He will tend to write only words within his spelling range, choosing to avoid adventurous language. That's why teachers often encourage the early use of dictionaries and pay attention to content rather than technical ability.
I was once shocked to read on the bottom of a sensitive piece of writing about a personal experience: “This work is terrible! There are far too many spelling errors and your writing is illegible (难以辨认的). ”It may have been a sharp criticism of the pupil's technical abilities in writing, but it was also a sad reflection on the teacher who had omitted to read the essay, which contained some beautiful expressions of the child's deep feelings. The teacher was not wrong to draw attention to the errors, but if his priorities had centred on the child's idea, an expression of his disappointment with the presentation would have given the pupil more motivation to seek improvement.
Teachers are different in their opinions about______ .

options.text: the role of spelling in general language development
the complexities of the basic writing skills

questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】推理判断题。
【应试指导】文章第一段第三句指出，至于怎样教孩子们拼写，拼写在孩子总体语言发展和写作能力中被重视的程度，看法却大不相同。故选B。

The expression “play safe” probably means______ .

questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】主旨大意题。
【应试指导】通读全文，作者在讨论拼写能力与孩子总体语言水平发展的关系后，对某些教师过分注孩子们拼写的正确性提出批评，并指出，孩子习作的内容比拼写正确更重要。因此，本文讨论的要点是：拼写和作文内容的关系。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第二章 阅读理解
questions.linkName: 第四部分 综合知识>第二章 阅读理解
questions.prompt:
Passage Five
There was a river with a small town on either side of it. The towns were linked by a bridge.
One day, a hole appeared in the bridge. Both towns agreed that the hole should be mended. However, disagreement came up as to who should mend it. Each town thought that it had a better reason for the other to mend the hole. The town on the right bank said that it was at the end of the road, so the left-bank town should mend the hole. The town on the left bank, on the other hand, insisted that all the traffic came to the right-bank town, so it was in their interest to mend the bridge.
The quarrel went on and on, and so did the hole. The more it went on, the more the hostility between the two towns grew.
One day a man fell into the hole and broke his leg. People from both towns questioned him closely about whether he was walking from the right bank to the left or from the left bank to the right, in order to decide which town should be blamed for the accident. But he could not remember, since he got drunk that night.
Sometime later, a car was crossing the bridge and broke an axle(轴) because of the hole. Neither town paid any attention to the accident, as the traveler was not going from one to the other, but was merely passing through. The angry traveler got out of the car and asked why the hole was not mended.
On hearing the reason, he declared, “I’ll buy this hole. Who's the owner?”
Both towns at once declared that they owned the hole.
“One or the other, whoever owns the hole must prove it.”
“How shall we prove it?" asked both sides.
“That's simple. Only the owner of the hole has the right to mend it. I'll buy the hole from whoever mends the bridge."
People from both towns rushed to do the job while the traveler smoked a cigar and his driver changed the axle. They mended the bridge in no time and asked for the money for the hole.
“What hole?" The traveler looked surprised. “I can't see any hole. I've been looking for a hole for several years now. I'm prepared to pay a good price for it, but there's no hole here. Are you pulling my leg or what?" He got into his car and drove off.
What did the two towns quarrel about?

options.text: Which of them should mend the hole.
Whether the hole should be mended.
Why there was a hole in the bridge.
When they should mend the hole.

questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】事实细节题。
【应试指导】由第二段第三句可知，两个小镇在谁应该修补桥上的洞这个问题上有争执。

One day, a hole appeared in the bridge. Both towns agreed that the hole should be mended. However, disagreement came up as to who should mend it. Each town thought that it had a better reason for the other to mend the hole. The town on the right bank said that it was at the end of the road, so the left-bank town should mend the hole. The town on the left bank, on the other hand, insisted that all the traffic came to the right-bank town, so it was in their interest to mend the bridge.
The quarrel went on and on, and so did the hole. The more it went on, the more the hostility between the two towns grew.
One day a man fell into the hole and broke his leg. People from both towns questioned him closely about whether he was walking from the right bank to the left or from the left bank to the right, in order to decide which town should be blamed for the accident. But he could not remember, since he got drunk that night.
Sometime later, a car was crossing the bridge and broke an axle(轴) because of the hole. Neither town paid any attention to the accident, as the traveler was not going from one to the other, but was merely passing through. The angry traveler got out of the car and asked why the hole was not mended.
On hearing the reason, he declared, “I’ll buy this hole. Who's the owner?”
Both towns at once declared that they owned the hole.
“One or the other, whoever owns the hole must prove it.”
“How shall we prove it?" asked both sides.
“That's simple. Only the owner of the hole has the right to mend it. I'll buy the hole from whoever mends the bridge."
People from both towns rushed to do the job while the traveler smoked a cigar and his driver changed the axle. They mended the bridge in no time and asked for the money for the hole.
“What hole?" The traveler looked surprised. “I can't see any hole. I've been looking for a hole for several years now. I'm prepared to pay a good price for it, but there's no hole here. Are you pulling my leg or what?" He got into his car and drove off.
The man who had fallen into the hole failed to answer any questions because he_______ .

options.text: had one of his legs broken

questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】事实细节题。
【应试指导】由第四段最后一句可知，那个人因为喝醉了，记不清楚了，所以无法回答提出的问题。

Each town thought that it had a better reason for the other to mend the hole. The town on the right bank said that it was at the end of the road, so the left-bank town should mend the hole. The town on the left bank, on the other hand, insisted that all the traffic came to the right-bank town, so it was in their interest to mend the bridge.
The quarrel went on and on, and so did the hole. The more it went on, the more the hostility between the two towns grew.
One day a man fell into the hole and broke his leg. People from both towns questioned him closely about whether he was walking from the right bank to the left or from the left bank to the right, in order to decide which town should be blamed for the accident. But he could not remember, since he got drunk that night.
Sometime later, a car was crossing the bridge and broke an axle(轴) because of the hole. Neither town paid any attention to the accident, as the traveler was not going from one to the other, but was merely passing through. The angry traveler got out of the car and asked why the hole was not mended.
On hearing the reason, he declared, “I’ll buy this hole. Who's the owner?”
Both towns at once declared that they owned the hole.
“One or the other, whoever owns the hole must prove it.”
“How shall we prove it?" asked both sides.
“That's simple. Only the owner of the hole has the right to mend it. I'll buy the hole from whoever mends the bridge."
People from both towns rushed to do the job while the traveler smoked a cigar and his driver changed the axle. They mended the bridge in no time and asked for the money for the hole.
“What hole?" The traveler looked surprised. “I can't see any hole. I've been looking for a hole for several years now. I'm prepared to pay a good price for it, but there's no hole here. Are you pulling my leg or what?" He got into his car and drove off.
Both towns rushed to mend the hole in order to prove that_______.

options.text: they had the right to sell the hole
they were able to mend the hole
they could afford to mend the hole

questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】推理判断题。
【应试指导】由文章可知，那个过路人说他将买这个洞，而只有洞的主人才能得到钱，为了证明他们是这个洞的主人，有权力卖这个洞，这两个小镇上的人争着去补这个洞。故选B。

In “Are you pulling my leg or what?”, the phrase “pulling my leg” refers to_______ .
questions.explanation:

【应试指导】从文章中我们可以看出，这个过路人原先提出要买这个洞，而现在洞已被补好，没有了，所以他也不用再付钱了。倒数第二段内容为这个人的辩解之辞，所以“pulling my leg"应为“开玩笑”之意。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第二章 阅读理解
questions.linkName: 第四部分 综合知识>第二章 阅读理解
questions.prompt:
Passage One
Public goods are those commodities from whose enjoyment nobody can be effectively excluded. Everybody is free to enjoy the benefits of these commodities, and one person’s utilization does not reduce the possibilities of anybody else's enjoying the same good.
Examples of public goods are not as rare as one might expect. A flood control dam is a public goods. Once the dam is built, all persons living in the area will benefit-irrespective of their own contribution to the construction cost of the dam. The same holds true for highway signs or aids to navigation. Once a lighthouse is built, no ship of any nationality can be effectively excluded from the utilization of the lighthouse for navigational purposes. National defense is another example. Even a person who voted against military expenditures or did not pay any taxes will benefit from the protection afforded.
It is no easy task to determine the social costs and social benefits associated with public goods. There is no practicable way of charging drivers for looking at highway signs, sailors for watching a lighthouse, and citizens for the security provided to them through national defense. Because the market does not provide the necessary signals, economic analysis has to be substituted for the impersonal judgement of the marketplace.
What does the passage mainly discuss?

options.text: The economic structure of the marketplace.

questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】主旨大意题。
【应试指导】本文讲述的是公共商品，如水坝、公路标志、灯塔、国防等，它也可以说是一种特殊的商品，故选C 。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第二章 阅读理解
questions.linkName: 第四部分 综合知识>第二章 阅读理解
questions.prompt:
Passage Five
All the housewives who went to the new supermarket had one great ambition: to be the lucky customer who did not have to pay for her shopping. For this was what the notice just inside the entrance promised. It said: “Remember, once a week, one of our customers gets free goods. This May Be Your Lucky Day!”
For several weeks Mrs. Edwards hoped, like many of her friends, to be the lucky customer. Unlike her friends, she never gave up hoping. The cupboards in kitchen were full of things which she did not need. Her husband tried to advise her against buying things but failed. She dreamed of the day when the manager of the supermarket would approach her and say: “Madam, this is Your Lucky Day. Everything in your basket is free.”
One Friday morning, after she had finished her shopping and had taken it to her car, she found that she had forgotten to buy any tea. She dashed back to the supermarket, got the tea and went towards the cash-desk. As she did so, she saw the manager of the supermarket approach her. “Madam," he said, holding out his hand, “I want to congratulate you! You are our lucky customer and everything you have in your basket is free!”
The housewives learnt about the information of free goods_______ .
questions.explanation:
【考情点拨】事实细节题。
【应试指导】由第一段第二句可知，她们是从超市入口处的广告牌中得知这一消息的。

questions.explanation:
[参考范文]
Dear Xiao Dong，
I am very sorry that l was out when you came to see me yesterday afternoon. The fact is that I had an engagement with some friends, and l was ignorant of your visit. Not until nine o'clock in the evening did I come back. You must have been disappointed by my absence.
I hope you will not leave the city this week. I'll call you on Friday afternoon at five o'clock. As this is the first time you come to Beijing, I will take you to some places that may interest you.
Please wait for me in your hotel at the appointed time.
Yours truly，
Liu Ling

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第四章 短文写作
questions.linkName: 第四部分 综合知识>第四章 短文写作
questions.prompt: Directions: For this part, you are supposed to write an essay in English in 100-120 wordsbased on the following information.Remember to write it neatly.你是王刚( Wang Gang)，写一封给朋友李明(Li Ming)的祝贺信，祝贺他获得复旦大学计算机科学硕士学位，并祝他今后在学习和研究方面取得成功。
questions.explanation:
[参考范文]
Dear Li Ming，
I am delighted to learn that you have received your Master's degree in Computer Science from Fudan University. I write to congratulate you on your success. We have good reason to feel proud of you. We know your degree of Master of Computer Science means diligent study and hard work. As your best friend, I have followed your progress with pleasure and interest. I can imagine how satisfied your parents are at this moment.
As I understand, you will continue studies in America soon. I wish you great success in your studies and research work.
Yours，
Wang Gang

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第四章 短文写作
questions.linkName: 第四部分 综合知识>第四章 短文写作
questions.prompt: Directions: For this part, you are supposed to write an essay in English in 100-120 wordsbased on the following information.Remember to write it neatly.以“Failure and Success”为题写一篇短文，内容包括： (1)人生中遭遇失败很常见； (2)每个人都渴望成功； (3)失败是走向成功的必经之路。
questions.explanation:
Failure and Success
Failure is a common thing in one's life．Almost everyone experiences failure in his life. When one fails in doing something, he often feels upset. Some people may move back facing failure. But others will stick on and achieve the final success.
Success is what everyone expects. It may lead to fame and glory. When one succeeds in doing something, he gets so excited that-he often forgets all the attempts he has done.
Failure is an important factor toward success. As the old saying goes, “Failure teaches success.” The way to success is full of various difficulties. Many important inventions or discoveries were achieved after hundreds of failures. And only those successes which have been achieved after many failures are really valuable and praiseworthy．

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第四章 短文写作
questions.linkName: 第四部分 综合知识>第四章 短文写作
questions.prompt: Directions: For this part, you are supposed to write an essay in English in 100-120 wordsbased on the following information.Remember to write it neatly.10月27日（星期六），你和同学参观了清华大学，请根据下列内容用英语写篇日记。内容应包括：老教授的热情接待，参观了图书馆、实验楼和校园等。可以适当增减细节。
questions.explanation:
[参考范文]
Saturday October 27, 2012   Fine
Today we visited Qinghua University. Early in the morning we arrived at the gate of Qinghua University, Where an old professor gave us a warm welcome. The professor showed us around and explained many things to us enthusiastically. First we went to the library. We saw many, many books and quite a number of students were absorbed in reading. Then we visited the lab building. On the campus, we found here and there students studying under trees. The old professor gave us a lecture in the afternoon. Time passed quickly. Before we knew it, it was time for us to say good-bye.

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第四章 短文写作
questions.linkName: 第四部分 综合知识>第四章 短文写作
questions.prompt: Directions: 当你在某单位已工作了两年，期待更换工作环境，并寻求更好的发展，选择辞职。请注明辞职的原因，并对企业这段时间的培养表示感谢。最后说明会保持联系，永远不会忘记这段珍贵的回忆。
questions.explanation:
写作评分标准
1．评分原则：
(1)本题总分为25分，分五档给分。
(2)评分时，先根据文章的内容和语言确定其所属档次，然后根据该档次的具体要求给分。
(3)纳入第五档次的作文应取得至少两位阅卷教师的认可。
(4)字数不足100或超出120的，酌情扣1分~2分。
(5)拼写与标点符号的准确性视其对表达的影响程度予以评分。英、美式拼写均可。
(6)如书写较差，以至影响表达，将分数降低一个档次。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第六章 词汇与语法知识
questions.linkName: 第四部分 综合知识>第六章 词汇与语法知识
questions.prompt: _____ the two, Bob is _____ student.
questions.explanation: “Of the two”表示在两个人之中，“the more diligent”表示更聪明的，这是一个固定搭配。定冠词“the”用于特指两者中的比较‌

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第六章 词汇与语法知识
questions.linkName: 第四部分 综合知识>第六章 词汇与语法知识
questions.prompt: The fire _____ by hot and dry weather.
questions.explanation: be caused by由.引起，是被动语态，这里用过去时，was/were causedby; 因为 the fre 火灾，是可数名词，所以用 was。这场火是由炎热、干燥的天气引起的。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第六章 词汇与语法知识
questions.linkName: 第四部分 综合知识>第六章 词汇与语法知识
questions.prompt: _____ a dog on the road,the car stopped.
questions.explanation: 这是非谓语动词的用法 因为seeing 不是the car发出的动作，所以在seeing之前加一个主语the driver即独立主格。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第六章 词汇与语法知识
questions.linkName: 第四部分 综合知识>第六章 词汇与语法知识
questions.prompt: Would you please _____ this form for me to see if I've filled it in right?
questions.explanation: 考查动词短语辨析。句意:请您帮我仔细检查一下这张表,看我填得是否正确,好吗? A. take off起飞;B. look after照顾;C. give up放弃;D. go over仔细检查。根据to see if I’ve filled it in right可知这里意思是请您帮我仔细检查一下这张表。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第六章 词汇与语法知识
questions.linkName: 第四部分 综合知识>第六章 词汇与语法知识
questions.prompt: It was along the Mississippi River _____ Mark Twain spent much of his childhood.
questions.explanation: 强调句型，其结构为It is/was+被强调的部分+that+从句，此处强调地点状语along the Mississippi River，结合句意“马克· 吐温童年的大部分时间是在密西西比河沿岸度过的。”，C项正确。

questions.subject: english
questions.chapterName: 第六章 词汇与语法知识
questions.linkName: 第四部分 综合知识>第六章 词汇与语法知识
questions.prompt: Some people are good at _____ but bad at giving back.
questions.explanation: 考查动词词义辨析．borrow借入，借用；take拿；取；bring带来，拿来；lend出借．根据句意“有些人擅长于借,但不擅长于偿还”，A项正确。
